resolved.title: Default Node.js v12.22.9 breaks scripts using ?? and ?. syntax
resolved.resolution: Added .nvmrc pinning Node 18. Current shell uses v18.20.8 via nvm. System default remains v12 but nvm-managed v18 is functional. Scheduled tasks may still use system default.

resolved.title: sync-gate-verify: SwarmMind snapshot.json missing
resolved.resolution: Created .identity/snapshot.json with key_id c707d41a7bb96d96 matching trust-store. sync-gate-verify now reports 0 issues for SwarmMind.

resolved.title: Recurring NACKs: outbound messages rejected for OUTPUT_PROVENANCE_MISSING
resolved.resolution: Root cause: prior cycle reports did not include OUTPUT_PROVENANCE text header in body field. Fixed by prepending OUTPUT_PROVENANCE header to body.

resolved.title: atomicWriteWithLease called with 4 args (laneId as leaseTimeoutMs) causing NaN expiry and silent outbox write failures
resolved.resolution: Fixed 3 call sites. Removed laneId arg so leaseTimeoutMs receives correct numeric value.

resolved.title: sync-gate-verify: kernel snapshot key_id mismatch
resolved.resolution: sync-gate-verify now reports 0 issues. Kernel snapshot key_id matches trust-store.

resolved.title: Cycle reports written to outbox/ get deleted before archivist verification
resolved.resolution: Cycle reports now written to journal/ (persisted in git). Outbox is cleaned by housekeeping but journal persists.

resolved.title: Lane-worker confidence gate blocks actionable tasks and terminal informational messages
resolved.resolution: Repositioned confidence gate after actionable routing with _isAssessment scope check. Only assessment messages (non-actionable with completion proof or non-terminal-informational) require confidence rating. 6 previously failing tests now pass (17/17).

resolved.title: Lane-worker confidence gate re-regression: unscoped check re-added before actionable routing
resolved.resolution: Cycle 13: Removed duplicate unscoped confidence check that was re-introduced at line ~584 before actionable routing. Scoped check at line ~654 retained. 17/17 tests pass.

resolved.title: Outbound handoffs NACK'd for invalid task_kind=drift_remediation
resolved.resolution: Resubmitted library handoff with task_kind=handoff (valid value). Stale NACKs moved to processed/.
